lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Hazardous, Pistol

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Pistol

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While Chaplain Grimaldus is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Command phase, if this unit contains one or more Cenobyte Servitor models, select one Relics of the Emperor Ascendant ability (see left). Until the start of your next Command phase, this unit’s Chaplain Grimaldus model has that ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Banner of Fallen Crusaders: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.


Remnant of the Fallen Temple: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.


Sceptre of Anointing: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This unit can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Primaris Crusader Squad
■ Primaris Sword Brethren

profiles.name: ➤ Sword of the High Marshals - One Handed

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

profiles.name: ➤ Sword of the High Marshals - Two Handed

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-infantry 4+, Devastating Wounds

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit and each time an attack is  made with such a weapon, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Primaris Crusader Squad
■ Primaris Sword Brethren

profiles.name: ➤ Sword of the High Marshals - One Handed

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

profiles.name: ➤ Sword of the High Marshals - Two Handed

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-infantry 4+, Devastating Wounds

lines.name: Description
lines.value: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

lines.name: A
lines.value: D6

lines.name: BS
lines.value: N/A

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Ignores Cover, Pistol, Torrent

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one of the following effects to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit until the end of the phase:


■ Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons.
■ Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of those weapons.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Precision

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per phase, when a melee attack is allocated to this model and the saving throw is failed, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a Character unit, add 1 to the Wound roll

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Primaris Crusader Squad
■ Primaris Sword Brethren
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Precision

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, you can re-roll one Wound roll and you can re-roll one Damage roll when resolving its attacks

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model’s twin heavy onslaught gatling cannon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability when targeting Infantry units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack with its twin las-talon that targets the closest eligible Monster or Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Hit roll

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 7 TACTICUS or PHOBOS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Units can disembark from this Transport after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge that turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 14 ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY models. Each JUMP PACK, GRAVIS or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION model takes up the space of 3 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move, you can select one Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge. Provided that unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and every model in that unit is within 3" of this Transport, it can embark within this Transport. The charging unit can then select new targets for its charge.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 7 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Primaris Crusader Squad
■ Primaris Sword Brethren
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad

You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one Captain or Chapter Master model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Primaris Crusader Squad
■ Primaris Sword Brethren
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad
